name: no-database
description: Remove PostgreSQL, Drizzle, Better Auth persistence, and the example items resource.

edits.find: const api = new OpenAPIHono().route("/health", healthRoute).route("/items", itemsRoute);

# If 5432 is taken on your machine, change DB_PORT and the port in DATABASE_URL together.
DB_PORT=5432
DATABASE_URL=postgres://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/app

# Any random string >= 32 chars. Generate a real one for production: `openssl rand -hex 32`
BETTER_AUTH_SECRET=dev-only-secret-change-me-please-really
BETTER_AUTH_URL=http://localhost:3000
edits.replace:
# API key accepted by the no-database auth stub for server-to-server requests.
API_KEY=dev-only-api-key

edits.find:
# PostgreSQL connection string reachable from the runtime platform.
DATABASE_URL=postgres://USER:PASSWORD@HOST:5432/DATABASE

# Generate a real secret with: openssl rand -hex 32
BETTER_AUTH_SECRET=replace-with-at-least-32-random-characters

# Public origin of the deployed app, without a trailing slash.
BETTER_AUTH_URL=https://cen-starter.example.com

# Migrations auto-apply at boot in production. Set to "false" to manage them manually.
# MIGRATE_ON_START=false
edits.replace:
# API key accepted by the no-database auth stub. Generate: openssl rand -hex 32
API_KEY=replace-with-a-real-api-key

edits.find:
# Keep migration SQL available without shipping Drizzle tooling or app source.
RUN rm -rf /app/backend-prod/src /app/backend-prod/drizzle.config.ts /app/backend-prod/tsconfig.json \
  && mkdir -p /app/backend-prod/src/db \
  && cp -R /app/backend/src/db/migrations /app/backend-prod/src/db/migrations

"verify:flavors": "tsx scripts/verify-flavors.ts",
    "db:generate": "node scripts/guard-setup.mjs && pnpm --filter @cen/backend db:generate",
    "db:migrate": "pnpm --filter @cen/backend db:migrate",
    "db:seed": "pnpm --filter @cen/backend db:seed",
    "db:studio": "pnpm --filter @cen/backend db:studio"
